related_files: Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1 — added Resolve-DispatchPrViewMetadata pure helper; rewrote PR-mode publish-success gate so PR mode only sets $published=true when both PR number and PR URL are available from `gh pr view --json number,url`; missing or partial metadata is publish-pipeline failure ($publishHardFailed=$true); simplified the PR-mode result-comment branch to emit only the full PR number + URL line, since the gate makes the partial branches unreachable
